mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN status = '정상' THEN 1 END) as used_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = '미사용' THEN 1 END) as unused_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = '비효율' THEN 1 END) as inefficient_count FROM hot_index_agg WHERE database_id = #{databaseId}
SELECT index_name, total_idx_scan as idx_scan FROM hot_index_agg WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} ORDER BY total_idx_scan DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT index_name, (100 - avg_idx_efficiency) as inefficiency_score FROM hot_index_agg WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} AND status = '비효율' ORDER BY inefficiency_score DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT collected_at as timestamp, avg_idx_hit_ratio as cache_hit_ratio FROM hot_index_agg WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} AND collected_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} ORDER BY collected_at
SELECT index_name, total_idx_scan as idx_scan, avg_idx_efficiency as efficiency FROM hot_index_agg WHERE database_id = #{databaseId}

SELECT collected_at as timestamp, total_idx_tup_read as idx_tup_read, total_idx_tup_fetch as idx_tup_fetch FROM hot_index_agg WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} AND collected_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} ORDER BY collected_at
SELECT collected_at as timestamp, avg_scan_time_ms FROM hot_index_agg WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} AND collected_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} ORDER BY collected_at

SELECT AVG(avg_idx_hit_ratio) as cache_hit_ratio, AVG(avg_scan_time_ms) as avg_scan_speed, SUM(total_idx_tup_read) as total_reads, SUM(total_idx_tup_fetch) as total_writes, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = '비효율' THEN 1 END) as inefficient_count FROM hot_index_agg WHERE database_id = #{databaseId}
